text.title: Competitive Intelligence Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

branch.question: Sales/product team will act on alerts?

conclusion.verdict: skip; CI without action loop is theater
weekly cadence; Haiku collector -> Opus threat analyst
daily cadence; Haiku collector + diff fingerprinting
monthly cadence; LinkedIn API + Ahrefs delta

example.trace: competitors=8 -> action_loop=true -> signal_type=funding_pricing -> weekly Haiku-Opus split.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
